title: avenula schelliana
intro: Avenula schelliana, also known as the Schell's oat-grass, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Avenula schelliana include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Avenula schelliana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
